etsy_title: Notion Template Freelance Project Management Invoice Tracking Client Dashboard Productivity
etsy_description:
Stay on top of every project, client, and invoice with this all-in-one Notion template built specifically for freelancers. No more lost emails, missed deadlines, or forgotten invoices — everything lives in one clean, customisable workspace.

This template includes a project tracker, client database, invoice log, and task board so you can manage your entire freelance business from a single Notion page. Whether you're a designer, copywriter, developer, or consultant, this system adapts to your workflow.

✅ Track project status from proposal to completion
✅ Log invoices with due dates, amounts, and payment status
✅ Store client contact info and project history in one place
✅ Visualise workload with Kanban and calendar views
✅ Duplicate and reuse for every new client or project

Instant digital download — no physical item shipped.

Compatible with free and paid Notion plans.

---
FAQ
Q: Do I need a paid Notion account?
A: No, the free Notion plan supports this template.
Q: How do I access the template?
A: You'll receive a PDF with a Notion duplication link immediately after purchase.
Q: Can I customise it?
A: Absolutely — every section is fully editable.
social_post: Freelancers — stop juggling spreadsheets 🗂️ This Notion template tracks your projects, clients & invoices all in one place. Instant download, fully customisable. Link in bio! #NotionTemplate #FreelanceLife #ProductivityTools

etsy_title: ADHD Planner Printable Weekly Time Blocking PDF Dopamine Reward Tracker Instant Download
etsy_description:
Struggling to stay focused and finish tasks? This ADHD-friendly weekly planner PDF is designed specifically for the ADHD brain — with time-blocking layouts, dopamine reward check-ins, and visual structure that makes planning feel achievable, not overwhelming.

What's inside:
✅ Weekly time-block schedule grid
✅ Daily priority spotlight (choose just 3 tasks)
✅ Dopamine reward tracker to celebrate wins
✅ Brain dump page to clear mental clutter
✅ Habit + mood check-in strip
✅ End-of-week reflection worksheet

Why this planner works for ADHD:
Short task windows reduce overwhelm. Built-in reward moments boost motivation. Visual layouts support working memory. No fluff — just what your brain actually needs.

Instant download — print at home on standard A4 or US Letter size. Use weekly, laminate for reuse, or load into GoodNotes.

FAQ:
Q: Is this a physical product? A: No, this is a digital PDF download.
Q: What size is it? A: US Letter and A4 included.
Q: Can I use it digitally? A: Yes, compatible with GoodNotes and Notability.
Q: How many pages? A: 8 printable pages.
Q: Will I get updates? A: Yes, free updates for life.
social_post: Tired of planners that don't work for your ADHD brain? 🧠 This printable weekly planner uses time-blocking + dopamine rewards to help you actually get things done. Instant download ➡️ #ADHDplanner #Neurodivergent #ProductivityTips
